title: tromotriche herrei
side_effects: Tromotriche herrei can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach cramps due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. In severe cases, consuming the plant can lead to respiratory problems, fever, and even organ failure. Prolonged exposure to its toxins may also cause irreversible damage to the liver and kidneys. If ingested, it is essential to seek medical attention immediately to prevent these side effects from becoming life-threatening.
